name: arctostaphylos uva-ursi
title: best benefits of arctostaphylos uva-ursi
description: Arctostaphylos uva-ursi reduces risk of UTI complications by preventing the progression of urinary tract infections to more severe conditions, such as kidney damage or sepsis. This benefit is crucial as UTIs can lead to serious complications, especially in vulnerable populations like older adults, pregnant women, and individuals with compromised immune systems, resulting in increased hospitalization rates and healthcare costs.
